tasks.summary: Add GitHub Environment reference to docker-publish.yml
tasks.description: Add environment: production to the publish job in docker-publish.yml. This requires manual creation of the 'production' environment in GitHub Settings with required reviewers.

tasks.summary: Add image signature verification to post-deployment.yml
tasks.description: Add a verify-signature step to the post-deployment smoke job (before curl tests) that uses gh attestation verify to check the deployed image matches the attested build provenance.

acceptance_criteria.description: post-deployment smoke job has verify-signature step
Step uses gh attestation verify with the deploy image digest
Step is conditional on image digest being present

tasks.description: Create scripts/drift-check.sh that compares deployed state (health endpoint, image tag) against git manifests. Runs as part of post-deployment validation. Add make drift-check target.

tasks.summary: Update GitOps compliance audit to mark Phase 3 complete
tasks.description: Update docs/GITOPS_COMPLIANCE_AUDIT.md Phase 3 section to mark tasks as complete. Update the score from 7/9 to 9/9 compliant.

acceptance_criteria.description: Score updated to reflect hardening completion
